strengths: Experience with deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow and PyTorch)
Knowledge of model deployment and MLOps basics
gaps: No experience with computer vision or NLP (only one area covered)
suggested_interview_questions: Can you walk us through your experience with deep learning frameworks? How do you decide which framework to use for a particular project?
How do you approach model interpretability and explainability in your projects?
What are some of the most challenging problems you've faced while working on machine learning projects, and how did you overcome them?
hiring_notes: Consider highlighting Ahmed's strengths in Python and deep learning frameworks during the interview. Also, explore his experience with model deployment and MLOps basics to gauge his understanding of production-ready models.
